description: Headout is an online travel and experiences platform for booking attractions, tours, events, and related city activities. It also works with affiliates and supply partners to distribute inventory and manage bookings.
summary: Headout exposes a documented HTTP partner API on www.headout.com (v2 requires a Headout-Auth API key; v1 mixes public and authenticated endpoints) and a public MCP server at https://aviator.headout.com/mcp/.
